title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at V-Mart Retail South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at V-Mart Retail South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
V-Mart Retail South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Visual Merchandiser at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About V-Mart Retail South Asia Partners:
V-Mart Retail South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with V-Mart Retail South Asia Partners!
